## I want to support the AS-CNPJ ecosystem

Thank you for your interest! Fill in the information below. The maintainer will evaluate and, if approved, add you to the supporters page at [as-cnpj.org/community](https://as-cnpj.org/community).

**All entries are manually curated.** Companies cited must authorize the use of their name.

---

> How you want to appear on the supporters page.

### Consent

- [ ] I authorize the display of my name/organization on the supporters page at as-cnpj.org.
- [ ] I understand that inclusion is curated by the maintainer and may be refused or removed at any time.
